description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a medium-brown finish, featuring a set of drawers on one side and a flat work surface. On top of the desk are various office items, including a computer monitor, keyboard, books, a desk lamp, and scattered papers, suggesting active use. The drawers are integrated into the right side of the desk, providing storage space for office supplies. The desk appears sturdy, with solid panel legs and a modesty panel at the back. The surface is cluttered, indicating a busy or possibly disorganized workspace. The overall design is functional and typical of desks found in offices or home studies.
description: A medium-brown wooden desk with drawers, a cluttered work surface, and various office items including a computer and books. The desk is sturdy and functional, suitable for office or home study use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the desk and the stacked drawers on the right side.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full work surface, drawers, and the arrangement of office items on top.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the modesty panel and the back of the desk, with some items visible behind the desk.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the cluttered arrangement of objects on the desk and the overall layout.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the drawers and open leg space, intended for sitting and working; the back has a modesty panel and is less accessible.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or general office desk
